# Copilot Instructions (VTEX IO Docs Repo)

This repository is a documentation set for VTEX IO skills.

When implementing or proposing changes, use these files as the canonical context:

- `ARCHITECTURE.md`
- `agents/vtex-specialist.md`
- `skills/vtex-io-core/SKILL.md` (then open only the referenced guides that match the request)

Do not assume files exist outside this repository. Prefer the paths under `skills/vtex-io-core/` when referencing internal guides.
